title: Fuyutsukis Last Words
wikitext:
[]: Fuyutsuki's Last Words             Quote Post by Cirk » Fri Jan 02, 2015 12:44 am Not sure if this goes in Discussion, but when Fuyutsuki said "Ikari, did you also finally get to see Yui again?" before he got tanged in EoE, was he talking to Rei, referring to her as Ikari, or was he talking to Yui, or Gendo, or was it a mistranslation in the dub, or what? I've been really confused about this but just now decided to finally make a thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri Jan 02, 2015 12:50 am I'm confused that you're confused. What's the ambiguity here? He's called Gendo "Ikari" throughout the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Cirk » Fri Jan 02, 2015 12:52 am But Gendo wasn't there so I don't know why he said it to Rei/Yui

[]:             Quote Post by Ispellnogood » Fri Jan 02, 2015 1:00 am It's Kind of like "I wonder if you got to see Yui again"

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri Jan 02, 2015 1:02 am He was talking to Gendo in absentia. You've never seen people in fiction talk to people who weren't there as if they were?

[]:             Quote Post by Cirk » Fri Jan 02, 2015 1:14 am I understand characters talking to others who weren't there as if they were, but not talking to them while actually saying it to someone else, which confused me as to who he was actually speaking to, you know what I'm saying?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Jan 02, 2015 6:08 am He was talking to himself, in a "well it's the end of the word, I wonder if Ikari (Gendo) managed to finally get to see Yui again." sense.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Fri Jan 02, 2015 8:32 am Also probably talking to the apparitions that is about to get him tanged, and the only person he felt any real affection was Yui, therefore because he saw Yui, as a kind of last thoughts about his former student he was wondering if Gendo also saw Yui like he did. Essentially, he saw Yui, and is a last comment wondering if his former pupil saw the same thing. (therefore, last moment of happiness?) Probably also belongs in chit-chat methinks unless the final words of Fuyutsuki could have a much broader meaning to the narrative of Evangelion. (and one can wring out a suitable discussion with theories)

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri Jan 02, 2015 9:39 am Discussion subforum is fine.

[]:             Quote Post by fizz450_03 » Wed Jan 07, 2015 11:26 pm ElMariachi wrote: He was talking to himself, in a "well it's the end of the word, I wonder if Ikari (Gendo) managed to finally get to see Yui again." sense.

[]:             Quote Post by Merkaba » Thu Jan 08, 2015 9:18 am Fuyutski knew Gendo's motive and plan, but he probably didn't know the exact mechanics of Quantum Rei showing everyone their heart's desire in order to break down their AT Field, and thus had no idea (until it happened) that he would ever have the opportunity to see Yui again himself.
